race.comment: I'M ODETTE (6) ended last campaign in good fashion and will be fitter for a recent trial coming into this with Pike sticking with her. She looks ready to go to the next level this campaign and she can pick up from where she left off last time in work. GODLESS STORM (1) disappointed last start in stronger company but was far too good in Maiden grade two starts back. Coming down to midweek level today is a big tick and he can return to his best form. MYSTERIOUS FORTUNE (2) was beaten 3L last week over 1200m at Belmont and rises back up in distance today. Martinan's 3kg claim comes in handy and he rates highly on his performances this time in work. Can get back to winning ways. LIPSTICK JUNGLE (4) rates highly off her latest effort and can feature again.
